title: podman manifest create: accept --amend and --insecure flags
body:
#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
`podman manifest create` now accepts a `--amend` flag.
The `podman manifest` `create`, `add`, and `push` commands now accept the `--insecure` flag as equivalent to `--tls-verify=false`.
```

Fixes https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/15346.
